# SyncAgency

> The CRM for creator talent agencies managing on Telegram. Operations CRM + Growth Marketing in a single platform.

## Main pages

- [Operations CRM](https://syncagency-en.vercel.app/) : CRM for creator talent agencies managing on Telegram, WhatsApp, and private platforms. Content library, broadcast campaigns, integrated payment processing.
- [Growth Marketing](https://syncagency-en.vercel.app/marketing) : Organic acquisition tracking on Instagram, TikTok, Twitter for creator agencies. Auto-scraping, funnel attribution, A/B testing.
- [Affiliate Program 40%](https://syncagency-en.vercel.app/affiliation) : Referral program with 40% recurring lifetime commission on every active subscription.

## Pricing plans

- Core Operations : €59/creator/month — Full Telegram & WhatsApp CRM, content library, broadcast campaigns, integrated payment processing
- Growth Marketing : €89/creator/month — Instagram/TikTok/Twitter tracking, funnel attribution, A/B testing, unlimited tracking links
- Empire OS : €129/creator/month — Core Operations + Growth Marketing all-in-one + assisted migration

## Product context

SyncAgency is a CRM built specifically for creator talent agencies that operate on Telegram and WhatsApp. It combines centralized conversation management, operator tracking, content library, payment processing, and acquisition analytics in one platform. Compared to generic tools (spreadsheets, separate analytics platforms), SyncAgency is purpose-built for multi-creator agency workflows with a 20% payment processor fee on the subscriber side.
